source_brief: User requested a first-launch promotional image for this repo, with Claude-like warm colors, a technical feel, and visible TUI usage such as using it on the moon.

design_rationale.subject: kobe, a terminal-native orchestrator for parallel AI coding sessions
design_rationale.audience: developers who work in tmux, SSH, devboxes, and local terminals
design_rationale.single_job: make kobe feel like a serious launch-ready terminal product, with the TUI visible and central
design_rationale.signature_element: a moon-surface field workstation where the real kobe TUI layout is visible on the rugged terminal and echoed in the visor reflection
design_rationale.revision_note: Updated after review: first render cropped the kobe headline and invented the terminal layout. Added actual TUI screenshot reference and safe-area constraints. Version 1.0.3 restored the dramatic oversized title direction on a 2400x1260 canvas; version 1.0.4 pulls the camera back and makes the operator smaller so the terminal and headline have room.
